name: Darke County YMCA Greenville
description: Come play pickleball at Darke County YMCA Greenville in Greenville, OH! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water.

name: North Park
description: North Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, OH. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
